groups.hint1: Words that share a similar sound.
groups.hint2: Different spellings, but the exact same spoken sound.
groups.hint3: All pronounced like a sweet fruit or a matching set.

groups.hint1: Things that might suddenly give way or fail under pressure.
groups.hint2: Words describing an abrupt physical separation or sudden opening.
groups.hint3: These terms describe a rapid, forceful breaking or bursting apart.

groups.hint2: Professional sports teams identified by a single name.
groups.hint3: Major League Baseball players whose last name is their team's name.

groups.hint2: Reorder letters to discover a type of food.
groups.hint3: Each word's letters can be transformed into a sweet, edible plant product.
